name: pocketpatch
description: Agent-facing CLI for local PocketPatch code review.

scripts.build:bundle: tsup src/bin.ts --format esm --platform node --target node20 --out-dir dist --external @effect/cli --external @effect/experimental --external @effect/platform --external @effect/platform-node --external @effect/sql --external @effect/sql-sqlite-node --external better-sqlite3 --external effect && chmod +x dist/bin.js
scripts.build:package: rm -rf dist && pnpm run build:bundle && pnpm --dir ../../apps/web run build && cp -R ../../apps/web/dist dist/web
